ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "onet_soc_code" TEXT /* O*NET-SOC code for the occupation */,
  "occupation_title" TEXT /* Title of the occupation */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the occupation belongs to */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the occupation is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the occupation was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "element_id" TEXT /* ID of the skill element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill element */,
  "skill_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the skill */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the skill is required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the skill was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation being assessed */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skill being assessed */,
  "scale_id" TEXT /* Scale ID for assessment (Importance or Level) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the assessment data */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Sample size for the assessment */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the data */,
  "lower_ci_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "upper_ci_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "domain_source" TEXT /* Source of the domain data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("scale_id") REFERENCES scales ("scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scales" (
  "scale_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the scale */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the scale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the scale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the scale was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_intervals" (
  "ci_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the confidence interval */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Level of confidence (e.g., 95%) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the confidence interval was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ci_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confidence_intervals_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "is_reliable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data source is reliable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppression_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the suppression rule */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment this rule applies to */,
  "suppress" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether to suppress the data */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for suppressing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppression_rules_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relevance_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relevance flag */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment this flag applies to */,
  "not_relevant" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the data is not relevant */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for marking the data as not relevant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the flag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relevance_flags_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Securely stored user password */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
